heading: MASTERS AND OFFICERS
label: 83 MASTERS AND OFFICERS
notes: Historical and Revision NotesFor certain vessels of the United States, chapter 83 prescribes the minimum number of licensed individuals (including masters), establishes the staff department consisting of medical and clerical personnel, restricts service under certain licenses issued without examination, and implements the Officers’ Competency Certificates Convention of 1936.
Amendments2021— [LXXXV], § 8503(a)(1), , , struck out item 8303 “Service under licenses issued without examination”.Pub. L. 116–283, div. G, title LVXXXV134 Stat. 4747Jan. 1, 2021
